risks.message: Board has limited visible fiducial strategy for assembly alignment
risks.recommendation: Add global fiducials to improve assembly registration and inspection consistency.
risks.why_it_matters: Consistent fiducial strategy helps automated assembly and optical alignment stay reliable.
risks.trigger_condition: Visible fiducial count fell below the configured assembly threshold.

fix_suggestion.fix: Add global fiducials to improve assembly registration and inspection consistency.

risks.message: Ground test-point coverage appears limited for bring-up and probing
risks.recommendation: Add at least one accessible ground test point so probing and scope reference setup are easier during bring-up.
risks.why_it_matters: Ground test points are foundational for repeatable probing, debug, and validation.
risks.trigger_condition: Visible ground test-point count fell below the configured minimum.

fix_suggestion.fix: Add at least one accessible ground test point so probing and scope reference setup are easier during bring-up.

risks.message: U1 (linear_reg) has no nearby decoupling capacitor
risks.recommendation: Place a decoupling capacitor close to the device power pin and on the relevant supply net.
risks.trigger_condition: Nearest valid decoupling capacitor exceeded the configured decoupling distance threshold.

explanation.root_cause: Power delivery path impedance or placement issue

fix_suggestion.fix: Place a 0.1uF decoupling capacitor close to the IC power pin, ideally within the configured threshold of 4.0.

risks.message: U2 (processor) has no nearby decoupling capacitor
risks.recommendation: Place a decoupling capacitor close to the device power pin and on the relevant supply net.
risks.trigger_condition: Nearest valid decoupling capacitor exceeded the configured decoupling distance threshold.

explanation.root_cause: Power delivery path impedance or placement issue

fix_suggestion.fix: Place a 0.1uF decoupling capacitor close to the IC power pin, ideally within the configured threshold of 4.0.

risks.message: U1 appears to lack enough local decoupling support
risks.recommendation: Add or reposition local bypass capacitors close to the device supply pins with short return paths.
risks.trigger_condition: Component power pins did not have enough nearby local decoupling capacitors within the configured local-support radius.

explanation.root_cause: Power delivery path impedance or placement issue

fix_suggestion.fix: Improve regulator-to-load placement, shorten power paths, widen traces, and reduce unnecessary vias.

risks.message: U1 may be missing nearby bulk capacitance support
risks.recommendation: Place appropriate bulk capacitance near the converter or regulator input/output path to reduce transients and rail collapse risk.
risks.trigger_condition: No likely bulk capacitor was found inside the configured regulator-support radius.

explanation.root_cause: Power delivery path impedance or placement issue

fix_suggestion.fix: Improve regulator-to-load placement, shorten power paths, widen traces, and reduce unnecessary vias.

risks.message: U2 appears to lack enough local decoupling support
risks.recommendation: Add or reposition local bypass capacitors close to the device supply pins with short return paths.
risks.trigger_condition: Component power pins did not have enough nearby local decoupling capacitors within the configured local-support radius.

explanation.root_cause: Power delivery path impedance or placement issue

fix_suggestion.fix: Improve regulator-to-load placement, shorten power paths, widen traces, and reduce unnecessary vias.

risks.message: Net VOUT has a long path between U1 and U2 (40.00 units)
risks.recommendation: Reduce routing distance, improve placement, or treat the net as timing-sensitive if appropriate.

explanation.root_cause: Signal path geometry or routing issue

fix_suggestion.fix: Shorten the net path from 40.0 toward 25.0 or below by improving placement or route topology.

risks.message: Net VOUT has a long path between Q1 and U2 (35.00 units)
risks.recommendation: Reduce routing distance, improve placement, or treat the net as timing-sensitive if appropriate.

explanation.root_cause: Signal path geometry or routing issue

fix_suggestion.fix: Shorten the net path from 35.0 toward 25.0 or below by improving placement or route topology.

risks.message: U2 has ground but no visible power rail
risks.recommendation: Verify that the component is connected to the intended supply net as well as ground.

explanation.root_cause: Power delivery path impedance or placement issue

fix_suggestion.fix: Connect the affected component to the intended power rail and verify that the configured power-net definitions match the board design.

risks.message: Regulator or converter U1 lacks a nearby shared capacitor network
risks.recommendation: Move input or output capacitors closer to the converter power pins so current loops stay compact.
risks.why_it_matters: Converters rely on tight capacitor placement to keep di/dt loops small and power noise under control.
risks.trigger_condition: A regulator-like component had no nearby shared capacitor inside the configured converter-cap radius.

explanation.root_cause: Power delivery path impedance or placement issue

fix_suggestion.fix: Improve regulator-to-load placement, shorten power paths, widen traces, and reduce unnecessary vias.

risks.message: Power net VIN uses a narrow trace width (0.20)
risks.recommendation: Increase power trace width to reduce resistance, heating, and voltage drop.
risks.trigger_condition: Power trace width fell below the configured minimum width threshold.

explanation.root_cause: Power delivery path impedance or placement issue

fix_suggestion.fix: Increase the power trace width from 0.2 to at least 0.5 or more, depending on current demand.

risks.message: Ground net GND has limited visible connectivity (3 connections)
risks.recommendation: Review grounding strategy and ensure intended loads and returns are visibly tied into the board ground structure.
risks.why_it_matters: Insufficient ground connectivity can increase susceptibility to EMI, transient issues, and inconsistent field behavior.
risks.trigger_condition: Ground connectivity count fell below the configured reliability threshold.

fix_suggestion.fix: Review grounding strategy and ensure intended loads and returns are visibly tied into the board ground structure.

risks.message: Net VOUT has a long signal path between U1 and U2 (40.00 units)
risks.recommendation: Reduce path length or improve routing to lower noise and signal quality risks.
risks.trigger_condition: Signal path distance exceeded the configured path-length threshold.

explanation.root_cause: Signal path geometry or routing issue

fix_suggestion.fix: Reduce the signal path length from 40.0 to at or below 25.0 by improving placement or rerouting.

risks.message: Net VOUT has a long signal path between Q1 and U2 (35.00 units)
risks.recommendation: Reduce path length or improve routing to lower noise and signal quality risks.
risks.trigger_condition: Signal path distance exceeded the configured path-length threshold.

explanation.root_cause: Signal path geometry or routing issue

fix_suggestion.fix: Reduce the signal path length from 35.0 to at or below 25.0 by improving placement or rerouting.

risks.message: Q1 appears to have limited nearby thermal via support (0)
risks.recommendation: Add thermal vias or improve heat escape near this power-dissipating component.
risks.why_it_matters: Power-dissipating parts often need nearby thermal vias to move heat into more copper area or additional layers.
risks.trigger_condition: Nearby thermal-via count fell below the configured heat-exit support threshold.

explanation.root_cause: Thermal concentration or poor heat spreading
explanation.impact: Hotspots, reduced reliability, or thermal stress

fix_suggestion.fix: Improve thermal distribution with better spacing, copper spreading, or thermal-aware placement.

risks.message: Q1 connects to relatively narrow copper for heat spreading (0.20)
risks.recommendation: Increase local copper width or area around this component to improve heat spreading.
risks.why_it_matters: Narrow connected copper can limit heat spreading and increase hotspot risk around power components.
risks.trigger_condition: Connected copper width fell below the configured thermal spreading threshold.

explanation.root_cause: Thermal concentration or poor heat spreading
explanation.impact: Hotspots, reduced reliability, or thermal stress

fix_suggestion.fix: Improve thermal distribution with better spacing, copper spreading, or thermal-aware placement.

executive_summary.headline: Board needs focused engineering review
executive_summary.summary: This board shows high design risk. The main risk concentration is in power integrity. The highest-priority issue is U1 appears to lack enough local decoupling support. The current design snapshot includes 3 components and 3 nets. The board is likely functional at a prototype level, but the highlighted issues should be addressed before stronger production confidence.

top_issues.message: U1 appears to lack enough local decoupling support
top_issues.recommendation: Add or reposition local bypass capacitors close to the device supply pins with short return paths.

top_issues.message: U2 appears to lack enough local decoupling support
top_issues.recommendation: Add or reposition local bypass capacitors close to the device supply pins with short return paths.

top_issues.message: Power net VIN uses a narrow trace width (0.20)
top_issues.recommendation: Increase power trace width to reduce resistance, heating, and voltage drop.
